## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential investment opportunity in GrowthX, an AI-powered content marketing platform.](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX combines AI workflows with expert human oversight to deliver high-quality content marketing services at scale](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Currently at $10M ARR, targeting $15M by Q3, with plans for Series B later this year to fuel expansion](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Unique value prop: Expert-level service at competitive prices, replacing multiple agencies/tools for customers](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Strong unit economics (48% win rate, 30-day sales cycle, $160k avg. deal size) due to expert-driven sales](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Evolution

  - [Marcel's career journey: IBM, HashiCorp, Scaleai, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Identified inefficiencies in traditional marketing spend (e.g., IBM's $1B+ annual budget)](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Developed content-centric approach, driving significant revenue/pipeline (e.g., securityintelligence.com)](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Transitioned from workshops to service model based on customer demand](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Raised Series A 2+ months ago, currently profitable but investing in growth](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Technology and Approach

  - [Built AI coding agent to codify expert work processes into reproducible code](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Focuses on replicating expert-level work, not just automating basic tasks](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Uses services model to validate and refine AI workflows before platformization](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Started with content marketing due to its foundational nature in knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Plans to expand into other knowledge work areas (e.g., hiring, PE services)](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Business Model and Market Positioning

  - [Delivers as a service currently, with plans to open up the platform later](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Replaces multiple agencies, tools, and internal hires for customers](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Targets $500B content marketing industry, with potential to expand to other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Competitive pricing ($160k avg. deal) compared to traditional agency costs](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Leverages expert-driven sales approach, eliminating need for separate sales/marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

### Growth Strategy and Future Plans

  - [Targeting $15M ARR by Q3, focusing on strong unit economics and foundation-building](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Plans to validate one more vertical beyond content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Considering strategic acquisitions to enter new verticals efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [Aims for Series B to fuel expansion and platform development](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting closer to GrowthX's Series B timeline](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Cynthia to introduce Marcel to other IVP team members](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Explore potential introductions to relevant IVP portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [Continue building relationship and trust between IVP and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/eKxs7psKV9VyPi8NxxTxs-w9rpKNXHkA?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
